Applicant.definition: Represents an individual or household applying for SNAP benefits.

Applicant_Eligible.definition: Indicates whether the applicant is eligible for participation.

Applicant_ResidenceCounty.definition: The county in which the applicant resides.

Applicant_ApplicationCounty.definition: The county in which the applicant files an application.

Applicant_ResidesInAdministeringState.definition: True if the applicant resides in the administering state.

Applicant_ParticipatesInMultipleCounties.definition: Indicates whether the applicant participates in more than one county.

Applicant_HasFixedAddress.definition: Indicates whether the applicant has a fixed mailing or dwelling address.

Applicant_ResidenceState.definition: The state in which the applicant resides.

AdministeringState.definition: The state administering the SNAP program for this application.

Agency.definition: Represents the county welfare department administering SNAP.

Agency_ImposesDurationalResidency.definition: True if the agency imposes durational residency requirements.

Agency_ViolatesPolicy.definition: Indicates whether the agency violates policy obligations.

Agency_RequiredToVerifyResidency.definition: True if the agency must verify residency information.

Agency_RequiresGrossIncomeVerification.definition: True if the agency requires verification of gross income.

Agency_RequiresNetIncomeVerification.definition: True if the agency requires verification of net income.

Residency.definition: Rules governing the jurisdiction where the household resides.

ResidencyInformation_Questionable.definition: True if the residency information provided by the applicant is questionable.

CountyResidency.definition: Residence in the county of application.

NoFixedDwellingRequired.definition: Applicant need not reside in a permanent dwelling or have a fixed mailing address to qualify.

SingleCountyParticipation.definition: Applicant may not participate in more than one county per month, except for specific exceptions.

NoDurationalRequirement.definition: The county shall not impose any durational residency requirement.

CategoricallyEligiblePAHousehold.definition: True if the household qualifies categorically for PA.

IncomeEligibility.definition: Income factors accepted without verification for categorically eligible PA households.

GrossIncomeLimit.definition: Total household income limit before deductions, accepted without verification for categorically eligible PA households.

NetIncomeLimit.definition: Net income limit after allowable deductions, accepted without verification for categorically eligible PA households.

CategoricallyEligiblePAHousehold.definition: Indicates whether the household is categorically eligible for participation.

AcceptedWithoutVerification_GrossIncome.definition: Indicates whether gross income limit is accepted without verification.

AcceptedWithoutVerification_NetIncome.definition: Indicates whether net income limit is accepted without verification.

Applicant_VoluntaryQuit.definition: True if the applicant voluntarily quit employment.

Applicant_ReducedWorkHours.definition: True if the applicant voluntarily reduced the number of hours being worked.

Applicant_HasGoodCause.definition: True if the applicant demonstrates good cause for quitting or reducing work effort.

Agency_DeterminesGoodCause.definition: True if the CWD determines that good cause exists when an applicant quits or reduces work effort.

CombinedIncomeTest.definition: Represents the combined gross and net income tests for SNAP eligibility.

IncomeWithinLimits.definition: True if both gross and net income are at or below their respective thresholds.

ResourceEligibility.definition: Household resources accepted without verification for categorically eligible households, except resource transfers.

Resources.definition: Total countable resources available to the household.

ResourceTransfers.definition: Transfers of household resources that may affect eligibility.

VerificationRequired.definition: Indicates that verification is required for a specific resource factor.

AcceptedWithoutVerification_Resources.definition: Indicates whether resources are accepted without verification.

SponsoredNoncitizen.definition: Noncitizen whose eligibility depends on sponsor information provided under federal and state regulations.
Applicant identified as a sponsored noncitizen.

SponsorInformation.definition: Information provided about the sponsor under Section 63-405.7.

MustProvide_SponsorInformation.definition: Indicates obligation of the sponsored noncitizen to provide sponsor information.

BenefitComputation.definition: Computation of household benefit amount using reductions and income deductions from the Thrifty Food Plan.

BenefitAmount.definition: Final computed benefit amount for the household.

ThriftyFoodPlanAmount.definition: Baseline Thrifty Food Plan amount before deductions or reductions.

ReductionRate.definition: Percentage reduction applied to the Thrifty Food Plan based on household size.

IncomeDeduction.definition: Thirty percent of household's net food stamp income is deducted from the reduced Thrifty Food Plan amount.

HouseholdSize.definition: Number of persons in the household, used to calculate the reduction rate.
